title: Slime Tweaks
description: Adds some tweaks and improvements to slimes.
body:
This mod aims to improve slime in Minecraft by adding some tweaks to it.

Tweaks

  • Mobs in Slime Chunks have a 10% chance to drop a slime ball. This can help players discover if they are in a slime chunk without using external tools.
  • Fishing in swamps will sometimes give you a slime ball.
  • Fishing in slime chunks will sometimes give you a slime ball.
